shape.seats: Array<{ seat_index:int, player_uid:string, nickname:string, photo_url:string, chip_stack:int, is_sitting_out:bool, hand_state:'in'|'folded'|'all_in'|'sitting_out' }>

current_turn.started_at: ISO-8601 (server timestamp; section-5's action clock counts down from this)

shape.winner_seat_indices: int[] (populated only when phase==='resolved'; supports split pots)
shape.revealed_hole_cards: Object<seat_index, [{rank, suit}, {rank, suit}]> (populated at showdown only)

action.amount: int (0 for fold/check, target total bet for bet/raise, 0 for call (server computes))

submitAction(tid, action).notes: section-5's betting controls call this. The Cloud Function validates turn order, stack, min-raise, and writes the resulting handDocument.

notes: section-5 NEVER directly writes to handDocument — only listens. All mutations go through Cloud Function submitAction. The easter_egg.triggered field is what section-6 listens for; it appears in the same document so section-5 and section-6 share the listener.
